strategy: Read XHS run evidence and rejected candidate memory, then map detected proof-chain and selection-gate signals into bounded add edits for KB-first workflow reuse.

edits.rationale: Historical XHS evidence separates publish facts, draft facts, content score, and compliant proof.
edits.before: Reuse matching workflow-KB entries before composing a new XHS content workflow.
edits.after: Reuse failed publish evidence as negative evidence only; do not treat it as compliant publish proof.

edits.rationale: Human review identified account login and authorization as a pre-handoff gate.
edits.before: Generate and score the content package before writeback.
edits.after: Keep account state as a hard pre-handoff gate; stop before draft or publish if account state is unknown.

edits.rationale: SkillOpt-style candidate changes need held-out selection evidence before acceptance.
edits.before: Write back new reusable lessons after the run.
edits.after: Accept candidate workflow changes only when held-out evidence improves the selected metric and required scenario gates remain intact.
